fields.name: Contract No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the filed service contract or service contract quote.

fields.name: Contract Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the filed contract or contract quote.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the filed service contract or contract quote.

fields.name: Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies the status of the filed service contract or contract quote.

fields.name: Change Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the service contract or the service contract quote was open or locked for changes at the moment of filing.

fields.name: Customer No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the customer who owns the items in the filed service contract or contract quote.

fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the customer in the filed service contract or contract quote.

fields.name: Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the address of the customer in the filed service contract or contract quote.

fields.name: Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies additional address information.

fields.name: Post Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the postal code.

fields.name: City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city of the address.

fields.name: Contact Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the person you regularly contact when you do business with the customer in the filed service contract or contract quote.

fields.name: Your Reference
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer's reference number.

fields.name: Salesperson Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the salesperson assigned to the filed service contract or contract quote.

fields.name: Bill-to Customer No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the customer that you send or sent the invoice or credit memo to.

fields.name: Bill-to Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the customer that you send or sent the invoice or credit memo to.

fields.name: Bill-to Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the address of the customer to whom you will send the invoice.

fields.name: Bill-to Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional line of the address.

fields.name: Bill-to Post Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the postal code of the customer's billing address.

fields.name: Bill-to City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city of the address.

fields.name: Ship-to Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for an alternate shipment address if you want to ship to another address than the one that has been entered automatically. This field is also used in case of drop shipment.

fields.name: Ship-to Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the customer at the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Ship-to Address
fields.tooltip: Specifies the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Ship-to Address 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an additional part of the ship-to address, in case it is a long address.

fields.name: Ship-to Post Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the postal code of the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Ship-to City
fields.tooltip: Specifies the city of the address that the items are shipped to.

fields.name: Serv. Contract Acc. Gr. Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the service contract account group that the filed service contract is associated with.

fields.name: Invoice Period
fields.tooltip: Specifies the invoice period for the filed service contract or contract quote.

fields.name: Last Invoice Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the invoice date when this filed service contract was last invoiced.

fields.name: Next Invoice Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the next invoice date for this filed service contract or contract quote.

fields.name: Starting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the starting date of the filed service contract or contract quote.

fields.name: Expiration Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the filed service contract expires.

fields.name: First Service Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date of the first expected service for the service items in the filed service contract or contract quote.

fields.name: Max. Labor Unit Price
fields.tooltip: Specifies the maximum unit price that can be set for a resource on all service order lines for to the filed service contract or contract quote.

fields.name: Calcd. Annual Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the sum of the Line Amount field values on all contract lines associated with the filed service contract or contract quote.

fields.name: Annual Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount that was invoiced annually before the service contract or contract quote was filed.

fields.name: Amount per Period
fields.tooltip: Specifies the amount that will be invoiced for each invoice period for the filed service contract or contract quote.

fields.name: Combine Invoices
fields.tooltip: Specifies you want to combine invoices for this filed service contract with invoices for other service contracts with the same bill-to customer.

fields.name: Prepaid
fields.tooltip: Specifies that this filed service contract or contract quote is prepaid.

fields.name: Service Zone Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the service zone of the customer's ship-to address.

fields.name: Cancel Reason Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cancel reason code specified in a service contract or a contract quote at the moment of filing.

fields.name: Last Price Update Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when you last updated the service contract prices.

fields.name: Next Price Update Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the next date when you want contract prices to be updated.

fields.name: Last Price Update %
fields.tooltip: Specifies the price update percentage you used when you last updated the contract prices.

fields.name: Response Time (Hours)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the default response time for the service items in the filed service contract or contract quote.

fields.name: Contract Lines on Invoice
fields.tooltip: Specifies that you want the contract lines for this service contract to appear as text on the invoice created when you invoice the contract.

fields.name: Service Period
fields.tooltip: Specifies the default service period for the service items in the filed service contract or contract quote.

fields.name: Payment Terms Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a formula that calculates the payment due date, payment discount date, and payment discount amount.

fields.name: Invoice after Service
fields.tooltip: Specifies you can only invoice the contract if you have posted a service order since last time you invoiced the contract.

fields.name: Allow Unbalanced Amounts
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the Annual Amount field on the contract or quote is modified automatically or manually.

fields.name: Contract Group Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the contract group code of the filed service contract or contract quote.

fields.name: Service Order Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the service order type assigned to service orders linked to this filed service contract or contract quote.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 1, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 2, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Automatic Credit Memos
fields.tooltip: Specifies that you want a credit memo created when you remove a contract line from the filed service contract.

fields.name: Price Update Period
fields.tooltip: Specifies the price update period for this filed service contract or contract quote.

fields.name: Price Inv. Increase Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the standard text code to print on service invoices for this filed service contract, informing the customer which prices have been updated.

fields.name: Print Increase Text
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the price increase text is printed on invoices for this contract, informing the customer which prices have been updated.

fields.name: Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the currency code of the amounts in the filed service contract or contract quote.

fields.name: Responsibility Center
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the responsibility center, such as a distribution hub, that is associated with the involved user, company, customer, or vendor.

fields.name: Phone No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer phone number.

fields.name: E-Mail
fields.tooltip: Specifies the customer's email address.

fields.name: Country/Region Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the country/region of the address.

fields.name: Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the entry, as assigned from the specified number series when the entry was created.

fields.name: File Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when service contract or contract quote is filed.

fields.name: File Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the time when the service contract or contract quote is filed.

fields.name: Filed By
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the user who filed the service contract.

fields.name: Reason for Filing
fields.tooltip: Specifies the reason for filing the service contract or contract quote.

fields.name: Payment Method Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies how to make payment, such as with bank transfer, cash, or check.

fields.name: Ship-to Phone No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the telephone number of the company's shipping address.

fields.name: Direct Debit Mandate ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the direct-debit mandate that the customer has signed to allow direct-debit collection of payments.

fields.name: Contact No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the contact who will receive the service contract delivery.

fields.name: Bill-to Contact No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the contact person at the customer's billing address.

fields.name: Bill-to Contact
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the contact person at the customer's billing address.
